recentArticles.title: R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Rjtheweirdo, Sekou, Lazer Dim 700, Marlon Craft & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Rjtheweirdo, Sekou, Lazer Dim 700, Marlon Craft & More. Listen to new must-hear songs from R&B/hip-hop artists like S! Ye quickly stole the weekend’s headlines from Pooh, thanks to his new *Bully* album, which opened at No. 2 on the Billboard 200 behind BTS’s *Arirang*, and its accompanying pair of SoFi Stadium shows in Los Angeles. With Fresh Picks, *Billboard* aims to highlight some of the best and most interesting new sounds across R&B and hip-hop — from a disco-infused Sekou to a new Lazer Dim 700 banger. Bridging elements of synth-pop, disco, and R&B, Sekou’s robust, chest-y voice reverberates across Cirkut and M-Phazes’ bass-driven soundscape with lyrics like, “It’s 2:00 a.m., and I’m waiting up for you/ If I want trouble, you’re really not hard to find/ Regret kicked in from the moment I called you.” Equal parts playful and cautious, Sekou casually dropped a springtime bop that can comfortably live on both R&B and pop playlists.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇Billboard文章介紹了本週R&B/Hip-Hop領域的新歌精選，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: All of Ye’s Solo Albums Ranked From Worst to Best: Critics’ Picks - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: As one of the century’s premier hitmakers and influential artists invading music’s A-list, ranking West’s albums has been a passionate discussion among hip-hop fans for two decades, and *Billboard*‘s Michael Saponara and Armon Sadler will be adding to that with the list here. *The Life of Pablo* was an ever-changing set of music in multiple ways: Ye repeatedly switched the title ahead of its official release and continually updated the music, even adding songs, for months after it hit DSPs. Nonetheless, the album was such a flex between the star-studded cast of features and records that matter to the culture to this day. (Credit to him for obliging to the traditional four-year structure of a college career, by the way.) Beyond that, he showed he was ready for the real world by taking his abilities to yet another level: Pick the five best songs from any album throughout history and match them up against “Stronger,” “Good Life,” “Can’t Tell Me Nothing,” “Flashing Lights,” and “Homecoming.” The games may be close, but if this were a seven-game series, it may end like the Golden State Warriors sweeping the Cleveland Cavaliers in the 2018 NBA Finals.

recentArticles.snippet: Three established YouTube channels have sued Apple, alleging that the company violated the U.S. Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by unlawfully accessing and scraping millions of copyrighted videos from YouTube to train its AI models. Apple's research papers indicate that some of the YouTube videos uploaded by the plaintiffs were used to train its AI models, the complaint alleged. ### Apple CarPlay Just Got Three Popular iPhone Apps. recentArticles.title: Paris Jackson’s Brother Blanket Failed in Attempt to Intervene in Estate Battle - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Paris Jackson’s Brother Blanket Failed in Attempt to Intervene in Estate Battle. ## Paris Jackson’s Bro Blanket's Team Failed in Attempt to Intervene In Battle With Estate. **Paris Jackson**’s little brother, **Blanket "Bigi" Jackson**, and his legal team were apparently unsuccessful in their attempt to resolve her bitter battle with their late father’s estate ... Michael’s estate executors, **John Branca** and**John McClain**, called out Paris for backing out of a deal they say was recently reached between the executors and Jackson's children. Paris has been fighting the executors over certain payments made by the estate to third-party law firms that she felt were excessive, and has been pushing for a better process in court for approval of such payments. In new docs, the estate said they were close to an agreement with Paris -- after Blanket and his legal team spearheaded an effort to resolve the issues. The executors claim Blanket’s lawyer told them he spoke for all three of Michael’s children -- including Paris and Blanket’s brother, **Prince Jackson**.

recentArticles.title: Wireless Festival Promoter Defends Kanye West as Sponsors Pull Out - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Wireless Festival Promoter Defends Kanye West as Headliner as Sponsors Pull Out, Asks Brits’ ‘Forgiveness’ for Rapper’s ‘Abhorrent’ Past Statements. Melvin Benn, who serves as managing director at Festival Republic, the U.K. promoter behind Wireless, issued a statement to *Variety* on Monday defending Ye based on his own experiences dealing with people who suffer from mental health issues. He called Ye’s previous declarations about Jews and Hitler “abhorrent,” but that they are “not giving him a platform to extol opinion of whatever nature” but only to perform songs that are “enjoyed by millions.” “Forgiveness and giving people a second chance are becoming a lost virtue in this ever-increasing divisive world,” he stated, “and I would ask people to reflect on their instant comments of disgust at the likelihood of him performing (as was mine) and offer some forgiveness and hope to him as I have decided to do.”.

recentArticles.title: Coachella Announces Set Times, With Jack White as Surprise Last-Minute Addition - variety.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Coachella Announces Set Times, With Jack White as Surprise Last-Minute Addition. Set times for the first weekend of performances this Friday through Sunday were finally posted late Monday night, allowing the world to know exactly when headliner Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber and Karol G will take the stage, on top of dozens of other artists. The unveiling of the itinerary revealed one surprise in the lineup, as well: an appearance by Jack White… not in a headliner slot, or anything even close to it, but rather a 45-minute Mojave Tent performance smack in the middle of Saturday afternoon, at 3 p.m. He’s set to perform at 11:25 p.m. on the festival’s hump night. The most wooden performance of the festival — arguably — will take place Friday at 2:55 p.m. Arrive late enough to miss this historic appearance and you might as well just turn around and go home.

recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West’s ‘Bully’ Debuts at No. 2 on Albums Chart as BTS Holds Top Spot With ‘Arirang’. The K-pop group’s latest album “Arirang” holds steady at No. 1 on the albums chart with 187,000 equivalent album units, down 71% from its opening week with 641,000. Last week, “Arirang” became BTS’ seventh No. 1 album and scored the biggest sales week for an album by a group in over a decade. ### David Zaslav to Receive More Than $550 Million in Compensation Related to Warner Bros.-Paramount Merger. Meanwhile, Ye’s “Bully” enters the chart at No. 2, becoming his 14th album to hit the top 10. (“Donda 2,” his last solo album, was deemed ineligible to chart in accordance with Billboard’s bundling guidelines.). ### Popular on Variety. Elsewhere on the chart, Melanie Martinez bowed at No. 3 with “Hades,” which earned 84,000 equivalent album units to become her fourth project to crack the top 10. ## More from Variety.

recentArticles.title: Ye Just Made $33 Million in Two Nights. Will His Comeback Last? - Bloomberg.com
recentArticles.snippet: The most influential recording artist of the century, Ye was once one of the highest-paid acts in the music business. Corporate America’s patience ran out in 2022 when Ye talked about going “death con 3 on Jewish people.” A couple months later, he expressed admiration and affection for Hitler. Yet while Ye’s music didn’t violate Spotify’s hate speech policy, the streaming service didn’t exactly push his songs. It wasn’t just corporate America that wrestled with Ye. His behavior forced his millions of fans to determine if they could separate the art from the artist. Ye’s most recent albums haven’t sold as well as the blockbusters, and his touring business was nonexistent. Yet while there are some people who will never forgive Ye, it’s clear that there are millions of people around the world who still want to engage with his work. For those who know Ye, the question isn’t whether he can keep himself stable for long enough to put out an album or play a couple of shows.

recentArticles.title: The Industry Is Once Again Giving Kanye West a Pass - consequence.net
recentArticles.snippet: Even Experts Can’t Agree on Kanye West. Despite what he emoted in the much-discussed *Wall Street Journal* apology ad from January, Kanye West has done pretty much none of the moral soul-searching or action that many, including me, called for. “It seemed sincere.” As someone who lives with bipolar type 1, like Ye, I agree with Dr. Jones. With regards to the Black community, Ye has famously made jaw-dropping comments like slavery was “a choice,” and worn a T-shirt that bore the slogan “white lives matter.” West has also appropriated the Confederate flag, a symbol recognized for its deep anti-Blackness. Instead, he reminded us that he doesn’t *need* to apologize to be a top artist; he’s Kanye fucking West. “It’s my understanding that I was in the top 10 most listened-to artists overall in the US on Spotify in 2025, and last week and most days as well,” West told *Vanity Fair* on January 27th. Even Experts Can’t Agree on Kanye West.

recentArticles.title: Badminton Destroyed by Westmoor Rams - M-A Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: First seed mixed doubles junior Kylie Lam and sophomore Colin Chien came off the court losing the first set 21-17 and the second set 23-21. Second seed boys doubles sophomore Jordan Lee and junior Dylan Chou met a similar fate, getting destroyed 21-8, 21-10 due to Westmoor’s superior drop shots. Second seeded girls doubles senior Jenna Lee\* and Annika(Kyoto) Furukawa had a close match, playing with excellent placement and drop shots. Even with a rocky start for M-A, second seeded junior Kaya Lam came out focused, utilizing dropshots and smashes to win her game 21-12, 22-20. Still, the energy from Lam’s victory was short-lived as the Rams pushed back, beating first seeded boys singles sophomore Jack Trevor 21-9 and 21-6. That momentum carried on, allowing third seeded boys doubles sophomores Thomas Nelson and Haruki Uenaka to pull out a narrow win in a three-set battle, 21-17, 16-21, and 21-15. The Bears didn’t give up, and tried to take the girls doubles third seed game with freshman Alexander Tong and sophomore Khanya Ntwa.

recentArticles.title: 'SNL' welcomes Jack Black to five-timers club in cameo-filled sketch - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: # 'SNL' welcomes Jack Black to five-timers club in cameo-filled sketch. ## "Saturday Night Live" welcomed Jack Black into the five-timers club with appearances by Melissa McCarthy, Tina Fey and more stars. The "Super Mario Galaxy Movie" actor kicked off the April 4 episode of "Saturday Night Live" with a star-studded monologue welcoming him into the "five-timers club," the informal group of celebrities who have hosted "SNL" that many times. Traditionally, a star's fifth "SNL" episode as host includes a sketch where other five-timers induct them into the club and give them their own jacket, and Black's show was no exception. Inside, Tina Fey showed up and quipped that Black is "officially the first Black in the five-timers club." But she acknowledged the club lounge has "seen better days" and offered a meta critique on the premise of the cameo-filled five-timers club sketches, saying the idea had been "run into the ground.". Before Black, the last star to enter the "SNL" five-timers club was Martin Short, who hosted his fifth episode in 2024.

recentArticles.title: Tina Fey, Jonah Hill, Melissa McCarthy Join Jack Black SNL Monologue - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: It’s a huge honor to join the Five-Timers club,” he said. ### 'Saturday Night Live': Jack Black, Colman Domingo to Host in April](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/snl-season-51-hosts-musical-guests-list-1236374762/). “Yes, you’re right, it feels like there’s evil lurking around every corner,” Black said, before Tina Fey popped up. “I wanted to congratulate you on a historic night,” she said, before joking, “You’re officially the first Black in the Five-Timers club.” Black questioned what had become of the club, which Fey explained that “it’s seen better days.”. “I think it’s made out of Paddington,” she added, which led to Candice Bergen, who is notably the first woman to join *SNL*‘s Five-Timers club, joining in on the fun. Hill jokingly referred to him as “my hero, Professor Snape,” to which the *Anaconda* actor corrected him: “It’s five-time musical guest and my partner tonight, Jack White!”. “We’ve got Melissa, Candice Bergen, Jonah Hill and Mrs. Tina Fey, it’s my nightmare blunt rotation, and I think it’s gonna save the day,” Black sang, before being given his own Five-Timers club jacket.

recentArticles.title: A music festival booked Kanye West, now known as Ye, and lost major sponsors - NPR
recentArticles.snippet: **Major sponsors drop out after Ye was announced to headline U.K. festival** **The rapper Ye was announced as the headliner for the Wireless Festival in London. # A music festival booked Kanye West, now known as Ye, and lost major sponsors. Rapper and producer Ye, also known as Kanye West, seen before a 2025 concert in Shanghai. Sponsors are exiting a major U.K. music festival and the country's prime minister has been critical after the influential rapper Ye was announced as the event's headliner. The once widely revered musician and fashion impresario, formerly known as Kanye West, has gained notoriety over the years for his antisemitic comments and activities glorifying Nazis, including a 2025 song called "Heil Hitler" and selling swastika T-shirts on his clothing site. Yet organizers announced last week that West would headline the Wireless Festival in North London for the entirety of its three-night run in July, invoking outrage from politicians and withdrawals from festival sponsors.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導肯伊·威斯特（Ye）因爭議言論導致音樂節失去主要贊助商，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Pepsi Cancels Sponsorship of U.K. Festival With Kanye West Headlining - variety.com
recentArticles.snippet: The scheduled three-night headlining appearance by Ye, formerly Kanye West, at the Wireless Festival in London is only growing in controversy. “It is deeply concerning Kanye West has been booked to perform at Wireless despite his previous antisemitic remarks and celebration of Nazism,” Starmer said in a statement to the British newspaper the Sun. Starmer was not the first political figure in the U.K. to raise an objection to the scheduled London appearance by Ye. Liberal Democrat leader Ed Davey expressed his view Thursday that Ye should be banned from entering the U.K., saying that “we need to get tougher on antisemitism.”. Ye’s three-night appearance at the Wireless Festival are being billed as his first U.K. appearance in 11 years. Some Jewish leaders in the U.K. immediately slammed the booking as “deeply irresponsible,” like the Jewish Leadership Council, which said in a statement to the Guardian, “West has repeatedly used his platform to spread antisemitism and pro-Nazi messaging … Any venue or festival should reconsider before providing their platform to Kanye West to spread his antisemitism.”.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要關於肯伊·威斯特因其反猶言論引發爭議，導致百事可樂取消贊助他將演出的音樂節，並有英國政治人物呼籲禁止他入境，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West headlining Wireless festival is ‘deeply concerning’, says Keir Starmer - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West headlining Wireless festival is ‘deeply concerning’, says Keir Starmer. PM says antisemitism is ‘abhorrent’ after booking of West, who has song called Heil Hitler and last year advertised swastika T-shirt. Keir Starmer has said it is “deeply concerning” that Kanye West, the US rapper who has made a series of antisemitic comments, is to appear at a British music festival. Starmer said: “It is deeply concerning that Kanye West has been booked to perform at Wireless despite his previous antisemitic remarks and celebration of Nazism. Ed Davey, the Liberal Democrat leader, has called on the government to ban West from entering the UK, saying: “We need to get tougher on antisemitism.” He described West’s planned appearance as “extremely serious”. The Jewish Leadership Council last week condemned Wireless festival for booking the rapper, who will appear after heightened attacks on the UK Jewish community. West apologised in January for his antisemitic remarks in a letter published as a full-page advert in the Wall Street Journal.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導Kanye West因反猶言論引發的演出爭議，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Pepsi Pulls U.K. Festival Sponsorship Amid Kanye West Booking - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # Pepsi Pulls U.K. Festival Sponsorship Amid Kanye “Ye” West Booking. Pepsi has reportedly withdrawn its sponsorship of the Wireless Festival in London amid the booking of controversial rapper Kanye West, now known as Ye. The “Runaway” artist, who has been at the center of criticism in recent years for several antisemitic remarks and releasing a song called “Heil Hitler,” is set to headline all three nights of the U.K. festival this summer, which runs from July 10-12. A spokesperson for Pepsi, which has been a long-standing partner and headline sponsor of the Wireless Festival for several years, wrote in a statement, “Pepsi has decided to withdraw its sponsorship of Wireless festival,” the *BBC* reported. ### Kanye West's Comeback Show Draws Star Power -- and Backlash](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/music/music-news/kanye-west-lauryn-hill-travis-scott-controversy-1236555979/). He told *The Sun* newspaper, “It is deeply concerning that Kanye West has been booked to perform at Wireless despite his previous antisemitic remarks and celebration of Nazism. ### Kanye West’s Comeback Show Draws Star Power — and Backlash.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了百事可樂因肯伊·威斯特的爭議性預訂而撤回對Wireless音樂節的贊助，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Brings Out Lauryn Hill and Travis Scott for Wild Second Night in L.A. - Rolling Stone
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West Brings Out Lauryn Hill and Travis Scott for Wild Second Night in L.A. North West, CeeLo Green, André Troutman, Zion Marley, and YG Marley also performed during Ye's sold-out concert at SoFi stadium. Over a year ago, Kanye West said that his then-unreleased 12th studio album *Bully* felt like his personal version of Lauryn Hill’s seminal 1998 record *The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill*. Ye, a longtime fan of Hill, sampled her live album *MTV Unplugged No. 2.0* cut “Mystery of Iniquity” on his Grammy-nominated 2004 single, “All Falls Down.” At the time, he couldn’t clear the original sample for the official release of the track and enlisted Syleena Johnson to re-sing the portions that featured on *The College Dropout* version. Ye’s daughter, North, who also made an appearance on day one, showed up for a second round to rap “Bless Me” and “Piercing on My Hand.” In another special moment, Ye invited André Troutman to perform their song, “All the Love.”.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了Kanye West的演唱會，但內容中未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Peach PRC Releases Debut Album ‘Porcelain’, Shares New Video for ‘Hold It for Her’ - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Peach PRC Releases Debut Album ‘Porcelain’, Shares New Video for ‘Hold It for Her’. Peach PRC has released her debut album *Porcelain*, marking a major milestone for the Australian pop artist following the breakout success of her earlier releases. Arriving April 3, the full-length project introduces a more expansive body of work from the singer-songwriter, who first gained widespread attention with her 2023 EP *Manic Dream Pixie*. That release debuted at No. 1 on the ARIA Albums Chart and helped establish Peach PRC as a rising voice in alt-pop, with a growing global streaming audience. ### Jack White, Anne Hathaway & More: Which Is Your Favorite New Music Release This Week? The album’s release is accompanied by a new single, “Hold It for Her,” alongside an official music video directed by Tom Carroll. The album builds on Peach PRC’s signature blend of diaristic lyricism and polished pop production, while expanding her sonic palette with electronic influences.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導澳洲流行歌手Peach PRC發行首張專輯《Porcelain》，並分享新歌《Hold It for Her》的音樂錄影帶，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: ‘Nobody would forgive me if I told the truth’: new film about pacifist turned Nazi collaborator divides France - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: Xavier Giannoli’s new film Les Rayons et les Ombres (Rays and Shadows) is told from the postwar perspective of Corinne Luchaire, a French actor who was once hailed as “the new Garbo” but grew too close to the Nazis during the German occupation years. “I wanted to make this film to show all the traps that a human being can fall into,” says Giannoli, who spent five years developing the script with screenwriters Jacques Fieschi and Yves Stavrides. In the film, Jean Luchaire is played by Oscar-winner Jean Dujardin (The Artist), and Giannoli says casting a popular actor in the role was essential to his vision of a “seductive” betrayal. “There is no Jean Luchaire without Otto Abetz,” notes Giannoli. While commending Giannoli’s film for its “blur” and “ambiguity,” Laurent Joly, a leading French historian of the Vichy regime and state antisemitism, is dubitative about its depiction of Jean Luchaire.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導一部關於二戰期間法國納粹合作者的法國新電影。

recentArticles.title: Golden Knights beat Oilers 5-1 to tighten Pacific Division race - Greenwich Time
recentArticles.snippet: EDMONTON, Alberta (AP) — Carter Hart made 31 saves and the Vegas Golden Knights tightened the Pacific Division race, beating the Edmonton Oilers 5-1 on Saturday night to remain perfect in John Tortorella's first three games as coach. Vegas moved a point back of Edmonton and Anaheim for the division lead, snapping the Oilers' season-best, five-game winning streak. Hart was activated off injured reserve and backstopped Vegas to a 6-3 home victory over Calgary on Thursday night. What UConn coach Dan Hurley said about Geno Auriemma's behavior. latestReport.daily_summary: 周杰倫近日話題不斷，公開了英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片，引發熱議。其「嘉年華II」巡演首站杭州場吸引5萬人，首唱7首新歌，並斥資5億打造14公尺巨型機甲，場面震撼。Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。

recentReports.daily_summary: 周杰倫近日話題不斷，公開了英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片，引發熱議。其「嘉年華II」巡演首站杭州場吸引5萬人，首唱7首新歌，並斥資5億打造14公尺巨型機甲，場面震撼。Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。
周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演於杭州盛大開唱，不僅首唱7首新歌，更出動14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬粉絲狂嗨。他公開英國古堡求婚昆凌的影片引發熱議，女主播分析求婚細節更顯珍貴。此外，Spotify也為他推出專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲。
周杰倫「嘉年華II」巡演杭州站盛大開唱，首度獻唱7首新歌，並動用14公尺巨型機甲，吸引5萬歌迷狂歡。他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的珍貴影片，單膝下跪的畫面引發熱議。此外，Spotify也推出周杰倫專屬「16包廂」互動體驗，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。
今日周杰倫新聞焦點：他公開了在英國古堡向昆凌求婚的感人影片，引發熱議。同時，「嘉年華II」世界巡演於杭州盛大啟動，現場5萬名歌迷狂嗨，更出動14公尺巨型機甲。此外，Spotify推出周杰倫專屬互動體驗「16包廂」，成功吸引三倍新粉絲加入。
今日搜集到的新聞中，沒有直接關於周杰倫的報導。主要焦點集中在其他娛樂、體育及商業新聞，例如MGK慶祝女兒生日、Jaafar Jackson分享對麥可傑克森的回憶，以及Kanye West專輯的討論等。周杰倫今日未有新的公開活動或重大新聞發布。
今日搜集到的新聞內容，經仔細審閱後，並未發現任何與華語天王周杰倫直接相關的報導或動態。所有新聞焦點均集中於國際娛樂圈、體育賽事、政治動態及其他社會議題，周杰倫今日並無公開或被報導的活動。
